semantic.role: LLM Transport Factory — Central factory that constructs LLMTransport instances for specific providers based on a provider string, acting as the public entry point for provider instantiation.
responsibilities: Creates LLMTransport objects for OpenAI-compatible providers (OpenAI, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Groq) and Gemini.
Maps a provider string to the appropriate concrete client implementation.
Throws an error when an unsupported provider name is passed.
outOfScope: Does not manage LLM runtime lifecycle, retries, or configuration loading.
Does not handle authentication or credential resolution.
invariants: The factory must return an LLMTransport for any supported provider string.
The provider string comparison must be case-insensitive.
Unsupported providers must result in a thrown Error.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, centralized factory for creating LLM transport instances, isolating provider-specific client code behind a single dispatch point.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — consolidates LLM provider instantiation into a factory pattern to support architectural governance across multiple AI providers.

publicSurface.description: Class that provides a static factory method for creating LLMTransport instances. Exported for external consumption by all LLM-dependent modules.
Static method that accepts a provider string and ProviderConfig, returns the corresponding LLMTransport. Throws for unsupported providers. The primary instantiation contract for the LLM subsystem.
